adguard-vpn

Install command:

Name: AdGuard VPN

VPN for privacy and security

https://adguard-vpn.com/

Development: Pull requests

Cask JSON API: /api/cask/adguard-vpn.json

Cask code: adguard-vpn.rb on GitHub

Current version: 2.9.1.1007

Requirements: macOS >= 12
